title: Flea Treatment in Fordham, Bronx | $350-$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment services in Fordham, Bronx. Effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Same-day service available. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Fordham home or apartment? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective flea treatment services throughout Fordham and the surrounding Bronx neighborhoods. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, ensuring your family and pets can live comfortably again.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Fordham residents for years with reliable, affordable flea extermination services. We understand the unique challenges of flea control in Bronx apartment buildings and multi-family homes, and our treatments are safe for children and pets while being tough on fleas.
localContext: Fordham's mix of historic apartment buildings near Fordham University, family homes near the Bronx Zoo, and walkups along Fordham Road creates ideal conditions for flea infestations, especially in pet-friendly buildings. Our technicians are familiar with the area's diverse housing stock and tailor treatments to address the specific needs of Fordham properties.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Fordham?
faqs.answer: Flea treatment in Fordham typically ranges from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and whether multiple treatments are needed. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: Most customers see a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours of treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as flea eggs hatch and are exposed to our treatment. Follow-up treatments may be recommended for severe infestations to ensure all life stages are eliminated.

faqs.question: Is flea treatment safe for my pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved products that are safe for pets and children when applied correctly. We recommend keeping pets and children away from treated areas for 2-4 hours until surfaces are completely dry. Our technicians will provide specific safety instructions based on the products used in your home.

faqs.question: Do I need to prepare my Fordham apartment before flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, preparation helps maximize treatment effectiveness. We recommend thoroughly vacuuming all carpets and furniture, washing pet bedding in hot water, and removing pets during treatment. Our team will provide a detailed preparation checklist when you schedule your appointment to ensure the best results.
